Links of Interest
Home :  High-Power Rocket Motors & Hdw :  Aerotech Level 2 HPR RMS Reloads :  98mm L2 Reloads - Special Order :  98/2560 Reloads - Special Order :  AeroTech High-Power K1999N-P Reload Kit HAZMAT - Special Order
98/2560 Reloads - Special Order

AeroTech High-Power K1999N-P Reload Kit HAZMAT - Special Order

$256.99
Sale: $205.59

  • Model: ARO-11199P-SO
  • Manufactured by: AeroTech

K1999N-P 98mm Warp-9 RMS-Plus Level 2 HPR reload kit - HAZMAT- Special Advance Order Price
 
Special Order - We do not regularly stock this item, but will special order it for you in our next stock order, and delivery will be within 4-12 weeks. Since we do not have to stock the item we can pass a little savings along to you!  So if you are willing to wait a little while, you save a little money!
 
Plugged Motor: Plugged reload kits do not utilize a motor-actuated ejection charge. Plugged motors must be used in conjunction with a timer, altimiter or radio-activated recovery system. Requires 98mm Forward Seal Disk during assembly.

Reload Kit for 98/2560 Motor (not included). Kit contains parts for one reload. This is a High-Power motor requiring Level 2 High-Power certification through NAR or Tripoli to purchase. Orders containing this item will not be shipped until proof of certification and age is received (more information here on the HPR information page).  

NOTE: Orders containing this item must be shipped via FedEx Ground HAZMAT and can be shipped within the Continental United States only. A $57.50 HAZMAT fee per order applies and will be added automatically at checkout time. FedEx Requires that ALL HAZMAT deliveries get an adult signature upon delivery..
TIP:  Order more HAZMAT items at one time to spread the HAZMAT cost over many items.

NOTE: SALE TO PERSONS UNDER 21 YEARS OF AGE PROHIBITED BY FEDERAL LAW. WARNING-FLAMMABLE: Read Instructions Before Use. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. FOR USE ONLY BY INDIVIDUALS 21 YEARS OF AGE OR OLDER. DO NOT SMOKE when loading these motors or use in the vicinity of open flames.

Ways we can ship this product:

FedEx Ground Only ($57.50 HAZMAT Fee will be applied at checkout)
